name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state



Init == \E s \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}] :
    /\ state = s
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = idle

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = IF state[i] = idle THEN trying


    /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state'[j] = state[j]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

TypeOK == \A i \in 1..N : state[i] \in {idle, trying, critical}

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, Participants, Coordinator
VARIABLES coordinator, participants, state, votes


vars == <<participants, coordinator>>

Init == /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> [state |-> "Init", vote |-> "None"]]
       /\ coordinator = [state |-> "Init", votes |-> <<>>]

Prepare == /\ coordinator.state = "Init"
          /\ coordinator.state' = "Prepare"
          /\ UNCHANGED participants

VoteYes == /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state = "Init"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "VoteYes"
          /\ coordinator.state' = "VoteYes"
          /\ coordinator.votes' = Append(coordinator.votes, "Yes")
          /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

VoteNo == /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state = "Init"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "VoteNo"
          /\ coordinator.state' = "VoteNo"
          /\ coordinator.votes' = Append(coordinator.votes, "No")
          /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

Commit == /\ coordinator.state = "VoteYes"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state = "VoteYes"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "Commit"
          /\ coordinator.state' = "Commit"
          /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

Abort == /\ coordinator.state = "VoteNo"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state = "VoteNo"
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state' = "Abort"
          /\ coordinator.state' = "Abort"
          /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ participants \in [Participants -> [state : {"Init", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, vote : {"None", "Yes", "No"}]]
         /\ coordinator \in [state : {"Init", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, votes : Seq("Yes")]

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, PhilosopherState, Thinking
VARIABLES forks, philosophers, vars


\* State variables
vars == <<philosophers, forks>>

\* Philosophers can be in one of three states
Thinking, Hungry, Eating == 0, 1, 2

\* Helper functions
left(i) == (i - 1) % N
right(i) == (i + 1) % N

\* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking, all forks are free
Init == /\ philosophers = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> Thinking]
        /\ forks = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> TRUE]

\* Transition relation
Next == 
    \E i \in 0..N-1 :
        \E action \in { "pickLeft", "pickRight", "eat", "putLeft", "putRight" } :
            \E philosophers' \in [i \in 0..N-1 |-> PhilosopherState] :
                \E forks' \in [i \in 0..N-1 |-> BOOLEAN] :
                    /\ vars' = <<philosophers', forks'>>
                    /\ action = "pickLeft"  => 
                        /\ philosophers[i] = Hungry
                        /\ forks[left(i)] = TRUE
                        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![left(i)] = FALSE]
                        /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = Eating]
                    /\ action = "pickRight" => 
                        /\ philosophers[i] = Hungry
                        /\ forks[right(i)] = TRUE
                        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![right(i)] = FALSE]
                        /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = Eating]
                    /\ action = "eat" => 
                        /\ philosophers[i] = Eating
                        /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = Thinking]
                    /\ action = "putLeft" => 
                        /\ philosophers[i] = Eating
                        /\ forks[left(i)] = FALSE
                        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![left(i)] = TRUE]
                        /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = Hungry]
                    /\ action = "putRight" => 
                        /\ philosophers[i] = Eating
                        /\ forks[right(i)] = FALSE
                        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![right(i)] = TRUE]
                        /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = Hungry]

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

\* Type invariant
TypeOK == /\ philosophers \in [i \in 0..N-1 |-> {Thinking, Hungry, Eating}]
          /\ forks \in [i \in 0..N-1 |-> BOOLEAN]

\* Safety property: no two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously
NoDeadlock == \A i \in 0..N-1 : ~(philosophers[i] = Eating /\ philosophers[right(i)] = Eating)

\* Liveness property: every hungry philosopher eventually starts eating
NoStarvation == \A i \in 0..N-1 : WF_vars[philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = Eating]](philosophers[i] = Hungry)

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max(num) + 1]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => num'[i] <= num'[j] \/ (num'[i] = num'[j] /\ i <= j)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
INVARIANT TypeOK

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]  \* Queue initialized with zeros
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]  \* Produce item (set to 1)
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<head, q>>

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]  \* Consume item (set to 0)
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, q>>

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ q \in [1..K -> {0,1}]

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state, hasn

(* State can be "Follower", "Candidate", or "Leader" *)

Init == 
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

(* A server can become a candidate if it hasn't voted for anyone in the current term *)
BecomeCandidate(i) == 
    /\ state[i] = "Follower"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
    /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = i]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"]

(* A server can become a leader if it receives votes from a majority *)
BecomeLeader(i) == 
    /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
    /\ \E t \in 1..currentTerm : 
        \E votes \in 1..N : 
            /\ Cardinality({j \in 1..N : votedFor[j] = i /\ currentTerm[j] = t}) >= majority
            /\ currentTerm' = t
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Leader"]

(* A server can become a follower if it receives a message with a higher term *)
BecomeFollower(i, t) == 
    /\ state[i] = "Candidate" \/ state[i] = "Leader"
    /\ currentTerm' = t
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Follower"]

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N : 
        /\ state' = state
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ \E action \in {BecomeCandidate(i), BecomeLeader(i), \E t \in 1..currentTerm : BecomeFollower(i, t)} : action

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>> 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) :
        /\ readers[r] = TRUE
        /\ readers' = Replace(readers, r, FALSE)
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) :
        /\ readers[r] = FALSE
        /\ readers' = Replace(readers, r, TRUE)
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ writer_active' = TRUE
     /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, Channels, InitState, InitChannelState
VARIABLES channelState, markerReceived, markerSent, state


vars == <<state, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>

Init == 
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> InitState[i]]
  /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> InitChannelState[c]]
  /\ markerSent = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
  /\ markerReceived = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = NextState(state[i])]
        /\ channelState' = channelState
        /\ markerSent' = markerSent
        /\ markerReceived' = markerReceived
  \/ \E (i, j) \in Channels :
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![(i, j)] = Append(channelState[(i, j)], state[i])]
        /\ state' = state
        /\ markerSent' = markerSent
        /\ markerReceived' = markerReceived
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ state' = state
        /\ channelState' = channelState
        /\ markerReceived' = markerReceived
  \/ \E (i, j) \in Channels :
        /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![(i, j)] = TRUE]
        /\ state' = state
        /\ channelState' = channelState
        /\ markerSent' = markerSent

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == token = 1

Next == token' = %(token, N) + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

TypeOK == token \in 1..N

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES store, action, key, value


vars == << store, action, key, value >>

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]
  /\ action \in {"Put", "Get"}
  /\ key \in Keys
  /\ value \in Values

Next == 
  \/ /\ action' = "Put"
     /\ key' \in Keys
     /\ value' \in Values
     /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![key'] = value']
  \/ /\ action' = "Get"
     /\ key' \in Keys
     /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ action \in {"Put", "Get"}
  /\ key \in Keys
  /\ value \in Values

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, Ballot, NULL, Value

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
  /\ chosen = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]

Prepare(p, b) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].promisedBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = NULL

Promise(a, p, b, v) == 
  /\ acceptors[a].promisedBallot = b
  /\ acceptors[a].chosenBallot = b
  /\ acceptors[a].chosenValue = v

Accept(p, b, v) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].promisedBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = v

Accepted(a, p, b, v) == 
  /\ acceptors[a].chosenBallot = b
  /\ acceptors[a].chosenValue = v

Choose(p, b, v) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].promisedBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = v

Chosen(a, v) == 
  /\ acceptors[a].chosenValue = v

Next == 
  /\ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : 
    /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
    /\ proposers[p].promisedBallot = b
    /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = b
    /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = NULL
    /\ \A a \in 1..N : acceptors[a].promisedBallot = b
    /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a] = [!acceptors[a] EXCEPT ![promisedBallot] = b, ![chosenBallot] = b, ![chosenValue] = NULL] 
                    \A a \in 1..N]
    /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [!proposers[p] EXCEPT ![maxBallot] = b, ![promisedBallot] = b, ![chosenBallot] = b, ![chosenValue] = NULL]]
    /\ chosen' = chosen
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : 
    /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
    /\ proposers[p].promisedBallot = b
    /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = b
    /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = v
    /\ \A a \in 1..N : acceptors[a].chosenBallot = b
    /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a] = [!acceptors[a] EXCEPT ![chosenBallot] = b, ![chosenValue] = v] 
                    \A a \in 1..N]
    /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [!proposers[p] EXCEPT ![maxBallot] = b, ![promisedBallot] = b, ![chosenBallot] = b, ![chosenValue] = v]]
    /\ chosen' = chosen
  \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E v \in V : 
    /\ acceptors[a].chosenValue = v
    /\ acceptors' = acceptors
    /\ proposers' = proposers
    /\ chosen' = [chosen EXCEPT ![a] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file = Seq(1..FILE_SIZE) \* File represented as a sequence of bytes
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)]
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 0]

SendChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ i \notin sentChunks
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, ackedChunks>>

AckChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

RetransmitChunk(i) ==
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks>>

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) : SendChunk(i)
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks \setminus ackedChunks : AckChunk(i)
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks \setminus ackedChunks : RetransmitChunk(i)
    \/ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)]
    /\ sentChunks \in SUBSET 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ ackedChunks \in SUBSET 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ retransmitCount \in [1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) -> Nat]

====
